allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['devices']; print\('count', len\(d\)\); print\(json.dumps\(d[0]\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; a=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['alerts']; print\('count',len\(a\)\); [print\(' -',x['type'],x['room'],'|',x['message'][:60]\) for x in a]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); devs=d['devices']; print\('count',len\(devs\)\); import collections; print\('types',collections.Counter\(x['type'] for x in devs\)\); print\('statuses',set\(x['status'] for x in devs\)\); print\('sample',json.dumps\(devs[0]\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json,collections; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['devices']; print\('count',len\(d\)\); print\('types',collections.Counter\(x['type'] for x in d\)\); print\('statuses',sorted\(set\(x['status'] for x in d\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; s=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('top keys',list\(s.keys\(\)\)\); print\('room keys',list\(s['per_room']['drawing'].keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; print\(sorted\(set\(a['type'] for a in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['alerts']\)\)\)")
